test_suite: Phase 1 MVP - SQL生成准确性测试

test_cases.name: 订单号精确查询
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT * FROM ods_orders WHERE order_id = 10000000001
test_cases.description: 根据订单号查询订单详情

test_cases.name: 手机号查用户
test_cases.query: 手机号13800138000的用户信息
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT * FROM ods_users WHERE phone = '13800138000'
test_cases.description: 根据手机号查询用户信息

test_cases.name: 商品价格查询
test_cases.query: iPhone 16 Pro的价格是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT price FROM dim_product WHERE product_name LIKE '%iPhone 16 Pro%'
test_cases.description: 查询指定商品的售价

test_cases.name: 用户订单列表
test_cases.query: 用户ID为12345的所有订单
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT * FROM ods_orders WHERE user_id = 12345 ORDER BY create_time DESC
test_cases.description: 查询指定用户的所有订单

test_cases.name: 订单明细查询
test_cases.query: 订单ORD2024010110000000001的明细有哪些商品
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT * FROM ods_order_items WHERE order_id = 10000000001
test_cases.description: 查询订单的商品明细

test_cases.name: 库存查询
test_cases.query: 商品ID为10086的库存数量
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT stock FROM ods_products WHERE product_id = 10086
test_cases.description: 查询指定商品的可用库存

test_cases.name: 商品列表-按类目筛选
test_cases.query: 类目ID为5的所有商品
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT * FROM dim_product WHERE category_id = 5 AND status = 1
test_cases.description: 查询指定类目下的所有商品

test_cases.name: 用户等级统计
test_cases.query: 各等级用户分别有多少人
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT user_level, COUNT(*) as count FROM ods_users GROUP BY user_level
test_cases.description: 按用户等级统计人数

test_cases.name: 昨日销售额
test_cases.query: 昨天总销售额是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT SUM(gmv) as gmv FROM dws_sales_daily WHERE stat_date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 1)
test_cases.description: 查询昨日销售总额

test_cases.name: 省份销售额分布
test_cases.query: 本月各省份销售额分别是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT province_id, SUM(gmv) as gmv FROM dws_sales_daily WHERE YEAR(stat_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) AND MONTH(stat_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY province_id
test_cases.description: 按省份分组统计本月销售额

test_cases.name: 同比增长率
test_cases.query: 今年销售额同比去年增长了多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT kpi_value, yoy_growth FROM ads_sales_kpi WHERE kpi_name = 'GMV' AND YEAR(stat_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
test_cases.description: 计算今年销售额同比增长率

test_cases.name: 品类占比
test_cases.query: 各品类销售额占比分别是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT category_id, SUM(gmv) as gmv, SUM(gmv) / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM dws_sales_daily) as ratio FROM dws_sales_daily GROUP BY category_id
test_cases.description: 计算各品类销售额占总销售额的比例

test_cases.name: 7日订单趋势
test_cases.query: 近7天每日订单量趋势
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT stat_date, SUM(order_count) as orders FROM dws_sales_daily WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 7) GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date
test_cases.description: 查询最近7天每日订单数量

test_cases.name: 大区销售对比
test_cases.query: 华东和华北地区的销售额对比
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT province_id, SUM(gmv) as gmv FROM dws_sales_daily WHERE province_id IN (华东省份列表) OR province_id IN (华北省份列表) GROUP BY province_id
test_cases.description: 对比华东和华北地区的销售情况

test_cases.name: TOP10商品
test_cases.query: 上月销售额TOP10的商品有哪些
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT product_id, SUM(pay_amount) as gmv FROM dwd_order_detail WHERE YEAR(order_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AND MONTH(order_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY gmv DESC LIMIT 10
test_cases.description: 查询上月销售额最高的10个商品

test_cases.name: 平均客单价
test_cases.query: 用户的平均客单价是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT SUM(gmv) / COUNT(DISTINCT order_user_count) as avg_order_value FROM dws_sales_daily
test_cases.description: 计算所有用户的平均订单金额

test_cases.name: 用户总消费
test_cases.query: 每个用户的总消费金额是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT user_id, SUM(pay_amount) as total_spent FROM dwd_order_detail GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC
test_cases.description: 统计每个用户的总消费金额

test_cases.name: 品类销售详情
test_cases.query: 各品类下商品的销售情况如何
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT category_id, SUM(quantity) as qty, SUM(pay_amount) as amount FROM dwd_order_detail GROUP BY category_id
test_cases.description: 按品类统计销售数量和金额

test_cases.name: 地区用户订单
test_cases.query: 北京用户的订单明细
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT * FROM dwd_order_detail WHERE province_id IN (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_name LIKE '%北京%')
test_cases.description: 筛选北京地区用户的订单明细

test_cases.name: VIP用户消费
test_cases.query: VIP用户的平均订单金额是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT AVG(pay_amount) as avg_amount FROM dwd_order_detail WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM ods_users WHERE user_level >= 2)
test_cases.description: 计算VIP用户的平均订单金额

test_cases.name: 商品退货率
test_cases.query: 每个商品的退货率是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT product_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status = 5 THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) as return_rate FROM dwd_order_detail GROUP BY product_id
test_cases.description: 计算各商品的退货比例

test_cases.name: 高频用户识别
test_cases.query: 近30天下单超过3次的高频用户有哪些
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) as order_count FROM dwd_order_detail WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 30) GROUP BY user_id HAVING order_count > 3
test_cases.description: 查询近期下单次数超过3次的用户

test_cases.name: 本月新增用户
test_cases.query: 本月新增用户数是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT SUM(new_users) as total_new FROM dws_user_stats WHERE YEAR(stat_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) AND MONTH(stat_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE)
test_cases.description: 统计本月新注册用户数量

test_cases.name: 高频活跃用户
test_cases.query: 近30天每天都登录的用户有多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT COUNT(*) as daily_active_users FROM dws_user_stats WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 30) AND active_users > 0
test_cases.description: 查询近30天每日活跃用户数

test_cases.name: 用户增长趋势
test_cases.query: 用户增长趋势如何
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT stat_date, new_users, total_users FROM dws_user_stats ORDER BY stat_date DESC LIMIT 30
test_cases.description: 分析用户增长趋势

test_cases.name: 日活跃用户
test_cases.query: 近7天的日活跃用户(DAU)是多少
test_cases.expected_sql_pattern: SELECT stat_date, active_users FROM dws_user_stats WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 7) ORDER BY stat_date
test_cases.description: 查询近7天的日活跃用户数

test_cases.name: 时间范围缺失
test_cases.query: 销售额怎么样
test_cases.missing_info: 时间范围不明确（今天/昨天/本月/今年？）
test_cases.clarification_prompt: 请问您想查询哪个时间段的销售额？
test_cases.description: 歧义检测 - 缺少时间范围

test_cases.name: 指标不明确
test_cases.query: 北京的数据
test_cases.missing_info: 未指定查询什么指标（销售额/用户数/订单量？）
test_cases.clarification_prompt: 请问您想查询北京的什么数据？（如销售额、用户数、订单量等）
test_cases.description: 指标不明确

test_cases.name: 时间表述模糊
test_cases.query: 最近的数据
test_cases.missing_info: 最近是多久（最近7天/30天/3个月？）
test_cases.clarification_prompt: 请问'最近'是指多长时间？（如最近7天、30天、3个月）
test_cases.description: 时间表述模糊

test_cases.name: 维度不明确
test_cases.query: 按维度统计一下
test_cases.missing_info: 未指定按什么维度统计（时间/地区/品类/用户等级？）
test_cases.clarification_prompt: 请问您想按什么维度统计？（如时间、地区、品类、用户等级）
test_cases.description: 维度不明确
